Monitoring.label: RESET PASSWORD
Monitoring.text:
Good Day

Password Reset to 0000

Please retry in 15-20mins

Tills Duty.label: MAIN SCRIPT
Tills Duty.text:
bash -c 'echo -e "\e[1;34m========== POS UNIT HEALTH CHECK ==========\e[0m"; echo -e "\e[1;33mHOSTNAME:\e[0m $(hostname)"; echo -e "\e[1;33mDATE:\e[0m $(date)"; echo -e "\e[1;34m===========================================\e[0m"; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== CPU LOAD ===\e[0m"; uptime; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== MEMORY USAGE ===\e[0m"; free -h; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== MEMORY STATUS ===\e[0m"; read total used <<<$(free | awk '\''/Mem:/ {print $2, $3}'\''); usage=$(( used * 100 / total )); if (( usage > 80 )); then echo -e "\e[1;31mRAM USAGE: $usage% - BAD (High Memory Usage)\e[0m"; else echo -e "\e[1;32mRAM USAGE: $usage% - GOOD\e[0m"; fi; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== DISK USAGE ===\e[0m"; df -h /; used_disk=$(df / | awk '\''NR==2 {print $5}'\'' | tr -d '\''%'\''); if (( used_disk > 90 )); then echo -e "\e[1;31mDISK USAGE: $used_disk% - BAD (Low Disk Space)\e[0m"; else echo -e "\e[1;32mDISK USAGE: $used_disk% - GOOD\e[0m"; fi; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== NETWORK STATUS ===\e[0m"; ip a; IP=$(ip -4 addr show eth0 | grep -oP '\''(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}'\''); echo -e "\e[1;33mCHECKING LATENCY:\e[0m $IP"; PING_OUTPUT=$(ping -c 4 "$IP"); if echo "$PING_OUTPUT" | grep -q '\''time='\''; then AVG_PING_MS=$(echo "$PING_OUTPUT" | tail -1 | awk -F '\''/'\'' '\''{print $5}'\''); if (( ${AVG_PING_MS%.*} > 100 )); then echo -e "\e[1;31mHIGH PING ALERT: Average ping to $IP is ${AVG_PING_MS} ms\e[0m"; else echo -e "\e[1;32mSERVER PING ($IP): OK (Avg ${AVG_PING_MS} ms)\e[0m"; fi; else echo -e "\e[1;31mSERVER PING ($IP): FAIL\e[0m"; fi; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== USB DEVICES ===\e[0m"; lsusb; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== RECENT SYSTEM ERRORS ===\e[0m"; journalctl -p 3 -xb | tail -n 20; while true; do echo -e "
\e[1;35m=== OPTIONAL CHECKS MENU ===\e[0m"; echo "1. Legacy (Global Debug log scraper)"; echo "2. Run EFT/DB2 Cache Database Checks"; echo "3. Check for Native Method Errors"; echo "4. View POS Restart Count Info"; echo "5. Run Fix Scripts"; echo "6. Drive Serial & Bad Sectors"; echo "7. Check DNS"; echo "8. Check Calibration Status"; echo "9. DISABLE/DISABLE POS(RESTART INCLUDED)"; echo "10.Transaction Finder"; echo "0. Exit Optional Checks"; read -rp "Select an option: " opt_choice; case $opt_choice in 1) echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== POS ERRLOGS CRITICAL ERRORS ===\e[0m"; grep --color=always -iE -C 25 '\''Fatal|DeviceException|JposException'\'' /beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log || echo -e "\e[1;33mNo matching errors found.\e[0m" ;; 2) echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== CACHE DB2 CHECKS ===\e[0m"; su - db2inst1 -c '\''db2 connect to esp ; sleep 2; db2 "select count(*) from ESP_CARDS"'\''; su - db2inst1 -c '\''db2 connect to cache1'\''; su - db2inst1 -c '\''db2 connect to cache2'\'' ;; 3) echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== NATIVE METHOD ERRORS ===\e[0m"; grep -i '\''NativeMethodAccessorImpl'\'' /beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log || echo -e "\e[1;33mNo native method errors found.\e[0m" ;; 4) while true; do echo -e "
\e[1;36mReboot Info Options:\e[0m"; echo "0. Back"; echo "1. Restart count (excluding 5am)"; echo "2. Restart count (including 5am)"; read -rp "Select option: " reboot_choice; case $reboot_choice in 0) break ;; 1) strings /beanstore/tlog/posHistory.log | grep re | tail -n 14 | grep -v " 05:" ;; 2) strings /beanstore/tlog/posHistory.log | grep re | tail -n 14 ;; *) echo -e "\e[1;33mInvalid input.\e[0m" ;; esac; done ;; 5) while true; do echo -e "
\e[1;36mSelect a fix:\e[0m"; echo "0. Back"; echo "1. ManualPatchUpgrade.sh"; echo "2. rebuildPOS.sh"; echo "3. triggerCalibration.sh"; echo "4. rebootPOS.sh"; read -rp "Option: " fix_choice; case $fix_choice in 0) break ;; 1) bash /home/pos/bin/ManualPatchUpgrade.sh; break ;; 2) bash /home/pos/bin/rebuildPOS.sh; break ;; 3) bash /home/pos/bin/triggerCalibration.sh ;; 4) bash /home/pos/bin/rebootPOS.sh; break ;; *) echo -e "\e[1;33mInvalid input.\e[0m" ;; esac; done ;; 6) echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== DRIVE CHECK ===\e[0m"; hdparm -i /dev/sda | grep -i '\''SerialNo'\''; echo -e "
Current Errors:"; grep sda /var/log/messages | grep -i error || echo "None"; echo -e "
Archived Errors:"; zgrep sda /var/log/messages* | grep -i error || echo "None" ;; 7) echo -e "
\e[1;33mChecking DNS...\e[0m"; cat /etc/resolv.conf; ping -c 4 google.com ;; 8) echo -e "
\e[1;33mChecking Calibration Status...\e[0m"; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== INPUT DRIVER STATUS ===\e[0m"; DRIVER_OUTPUT=$(grep -i "Using input driver" /var/log/Xorg.0.log); if [[ -n "$DRIVER_OUTPUT" ]]; then echo -e "\e[1;32mINPUT DRIVERS DETECTED:\e[0m"; echo "$DRIVER_OUTPUT"; else echo -e "\e[1;31mUNABLE TO DETERMINE INPUT DRIVERS\e[0m"; fi; echo -e "
\e[1;36m=== CALIBRATION ERRORS ===\e[0m"; grep -iE "device removed|removing device|disconnect|fail|error|reset|calibration|axis|coordinate|out of range" /var/log/Xorg.0.log /var/log/Xorg.0.log.old || echo -e "\e[1;32mNo calibration-related errors found.\e[0m" ;; 9) choice=""; while [[ "$choice" != "1" && "$choice" != "2" ]]; do echo -e "
\e[1;33mChoose an option:\e[0m"; echo "1. DISABLE POS"; echo "2. ENABLE POS"; read -rp "Option: " choice; if [[ "$choice" != "1" && "$choice" != "2" ]]; then echo -e "\e[1;33mInvalid input. Please enter 1 or 2.\e[0m"; fi; done; if [[ "$choice" == "1" ]]; then echo -e "
\e[1;31mDISABLING POS...\e[0m"; mv /beanstore/pos/launcher.sh /beanstore/pos/Xlauncher.sh; echo -e "\e[1;31mPOS DISABLED. RESTARTING APPLICATION...\e[0m"; else echo -e "
\e[1;32mENABLING POS...\e[0m"; mv /beanstore/pos/Xlauncher.sh /beanstore/pos/launcher.sh; echo -e "\e[1;32mPOS ENABLED. REBOOTING...\e[0m"; rsb; fi ;; 10) echo -e "\e[1;34m========== TRANSACTION SEARCH ==========\e[0m"; read -p "Enter transaction number: " txn; read -p "Enter date (YYYY-MM-DD) or press Enter for today: " date; if [ -z "$date" ]; then logfile="/beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log"; else logfile="/beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log.$date"; fi; outfile="/tmp/${txn}.log"; if [ ! -f "$logfile" ]; then echo -e "\e[1;31m? Log file not found: $logfile\e[0m"; exit 1; fi; echo -e "
\e[1;33m?? Searching in:\e[0m $logfile"; echo -e "\e[1;34m=======================================\e[0m"; grep -C 8 "<txnNumber>$txn</txnNumber>" "$logfile" > "$outfile"; if [ ! -s "$outfile" ]; then echo -e "\e[1;31m? No transaction found!\e[0m"; rm -f "$outfile"; exit 1; fi; store=$(grep -m1 "<storeCode>" "$outfile" | sed -E '\''s/.*<storeCode>(.*)</storeCode>.*/\1/'\'' ); till=$(grep -m1 "<till>" "$outfile" | sed -E '\''s/.*<till>(.*)</till>.*/\1/'\'' ); operator=$(grep -m1 "<operatorCode" "$outfile" | sed -E '\''s/.*name="([^"]+)".*/\1/'\'' ); status=$(grep -m1 "<event type=" "$outfile" | sed -E '\''s/.*type="([^"]+)".*/\1/'\'' ); echo -e "
\e[1;36m?? TRANSACTION SUMMARY\e[0m"; echo -e "\e[1;37m---------------------------------------\e[0m"; echo -e "Store     : \e[1;32m${store:-N/A}\e[0m"; echo -e "Till      : \e[1;32m${till:-N/A}\e[0m"; echo -e "Operator  : \e[1;32m${operator:-N/A}\e[0m"; echo -e "Status    : \e[1;32m${status:-N/A}\e[0m"; echo -e "\e[1;37m---------------------------------------\e[0m"; timestamps=$(grep "<POSEventMessage>" -B1 "$outfile" | grep -E "^[0-9]{4}-" | awk '\''{print $1" "$2}'\''); echo -e "
\e[1;35m?? TIME GAP ANALYSIS\e[0m"; prev_time=""; while read -r line; do current_epoch=$(date -d "$line" +%s 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$prev_time" ]; then diff=$((current_epoch - prev_time)); if [ $diff -gt 360 ]; then echo -e "\e[1;31m?? Gap detected: $((diff/60)) minutes between transactions at $line\e[0m"; fi; fi; prev_time=$current_epoch; done <<< "$timestamps"; echo -e "
\e[1;32m?? TRANSACTION LOG\e[0m
"; grep --color=always -C 10 "<txnNumber>$txn</txnNumber>" "$logfile" | sed "s/<txnNumber>$txn</txnNumber>/\x1b[1;41m&\x1b[0m/g"; echo -e "
\e[1;34m?? Output saved to:\e[0m $outfile" ;; 0) echo -e "\e[1;32mExiting.\e[0m"; break ;; *) echo -e "\e[1;33mInvalid input.\e[0m" ;; esac; done'

Tills Duty.label: EFT SCRIPT
Tills Duty.text: RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[1;33m'; CYAN='\033[0;36m'; NC='\033[0m'; while true; do echo -e "${CYAN}Select from the following options:${NC}"; echo -e "1. EFT Errors Within pos.debug.log"; echo -e "2. Postilion Refresh and Reboot POS"; echo -e "3. Perform ./rec and Restart POS App"; echo -e "4. POS Memory Check"; echo -e "5. Postilion Config Server Check"; echo -e "6. Check Connected Devices"; echo -e "7. EnterKey"; echo -e "8. Rollout Group Check"; echo -e "9. PanEntry Checks"; echo -e "10. Exit"; read -p "Enter your choice (1-10): " choice; case $choice in 1) echo -e "${GREEN}Searching for EFT errors in pos.debug.log...${NC}"; grep -C 15 "Native" /Postilion/logs/pos.debug.log;; 2) echo -e "${RED}Refreshing Postilion and rebooting...${NC}"; cd /Postilion/eSocket.POS/scripts/ && ./rec.sh; echo -e "${RED}Rebooting POS...${NC}"; cd /home/pos/bin/ && ./rebootPOS.sh;; 3) echo -e "${RED}Performing ./rec...${NC}"; echo -e "${YELLOW}Cleaning up incoming files...${NC}"; rm /Postilion/eSocket.POS/incoming/esp*; cd /Postilion/eSocket.POS/scripts/ && ./rec.sh; echo -e "${YELLOW}Restarting POS...${NC}"; cd /home/pos/bin/ && ./restartPOSApp.sh; echo -e "${GREEN}Tailing PED Errors...${NC}"; tail -F /Postilion/logs/pos.debug.log | grep -C 13 'Native'; echo -e "${GREEN}Rec script and POS Restarted. Please check the output above for any errors.${NC}";; 4) echo -e "${RED}Performing POS memory check...${NC}"; free -m;; 5) echo -e "${GREEN}Postilion Config Server Check...${NC}"; telnet $(grep 'wcstoreconf' /Postilion/esp.properties | awk -F'= ' '{print $2}' | head -n1) 58080;; 6) echo -e "${GREEN}Checking Connected Devices...${NC}"; lsusb;; 7) echo -e "Sending EnterKey Command To POS"; cd /home/pos/bin/ && ./enterkey.sh;; 8) echo -e "${YELLOW}Checking Rollout Group...${NC}"; grep Roll /Postilion/eSocket.POS/incoming/*;; 9) echo -e "${YELLOW}Performing PanEntry Checks...${NC}"; grep -E 'panEntryMode=(ICC_CONTACTLESS|ICC|UNKNOWN|MAGSTRIPE_SWIPED)' /beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log;; 10) echo -e "Exiting the script."; exit 0;; *) echo -e "Invalid choice. Please select a valid option."; esac; done

Tills Duty.label: Check POS Crash
Tills Duty.text: echo "=== NCR POS DIAGNOSTICS ==="; echo; grep -iE "NCRLoader|segfault|coredump|fatal|crash" /var/log/messages | tail -20; echo; echo "=== CRASH COUNT ==="; grep -icE "NCRLoader.*segfault|segfault|coredump|fatal|crash" /var/log/messages; echo; echo "=== LATEST EVENT ==="; grep -iE "NCRLoader|segfault|coredump|fatal|crash" /var/log/messages | tail -1

Tills Duty.label: TXN Finder
Tills Duty.text: while true; do clear; echo -e "\e[1;34m========== POS LOG TOOL ==========\e[0m"; echo "1) Search Transaction"; echo "2) Exit"; echo -e "\e[1;34m==================================\e[0m"; read -p "Choose an option: " opt; case $opt in 1) read -p "Enter transaction number: " txn; read -p "Enter date (YYYY-MM-DD, Enter=today): " d; f="/beanstore/PosErrlogs/global.debug.log${d:+.$d}"; o="/tmp/${txn}.log"; [ ! -f "$f" ] && echo -e "\e[1;31m? File not found: $f\e[0m" && read -p "Press Enter..." && continue; grep -C8 "<txnNumber>$txn</txnNumber>" "$f" > "$o"; [ ! -s "$o" ] && echo -e "\e[1;31m? No transaction found\e[0m" && rm -f "$o" && read -p "Press Enter..." && continue; store=$(grep -m1 "<storeCode>" "$o"|sed -E 's/.*>(.*)<.*/\1/'); till=$(grep -m1 "<till>" "$o"|sed -E 's/.*>(.*)<.*/\1/'); opn=$(grep -m1 "<operatorCode" "$o"|sed -E 's/.*name="([^"]+)".*/\1/'); opi=$(grep -A1 "<operatorCode" "$o"|grep "<value>"|head -1|sed -E 's/.*>(.*)<.*/\1/'); st=$(grep -m1 "<event type=" "$o"|sed -E 's/.*type="([^"]+)".*/\1/'); cnt=$(grep -c "<txnNumber>$txn</txnNumber>" "$f"); ts=$(grep "<POSEventMessage>" -B1 "$o"|grep -E "^[0-9]{4}-"|awk '{print $1" "$2}'); first=$(head -1 <<< "$ts"); last=$(tail -1 <<< "$ts"); s=$(date -d "$first" +%s 2>/dev/null); e=$(date -d "$last" +%s 2>/dev/null); dur=$((e-s)); clear; echo -e "\e[1;36m?? SUMMARY\e[0m"; echo -e "Store:\e[32m ${store:-N/A}\e[0m | Till:\e[32m ${till:-N/A}\e[0m"; echo -e "Operator:\e[32m ${opn:-N/A} (${opi:-N/A})\e[0m"; echo -e "Status:\e[32m ${st:-N/A}\e[0m | Attempts:\e[33m $cnt\e[0m | Duration:\e[36m $((dur/60))m $((dur%60))s\e[0m"; echo -e "

Tills Duty.label: POS CRASH CHECKS
Tills Duty.text: echo "=== POS CRASH CHECK ==="; grep -iE "segfault|NCRLoader|coredump|fatal|crash" /var/log/messages | tail -20 | sed 's/^/[CRASH] /'; echo; if grep -qiE "segfault|NCRLoader|coredump|fatal|crash" /var/log/messages; then echo "[RESULT] POS HAS CRASHED"; else echo "[RESULT] NO POS CRASH DETECTED"; fi
